java.lang.AssertionError: Expected error message for empty fields not found! Actual page text: Log in to securely access your 529 plan account Your account is protected with two-factor authentication. Each time you log in, you're required to enter a one-time-use PIN to verify your identity. If this is your first time logging into your account since our transition to the new NJBEST 529 College Savings Plan experience on November 18, 2024, you must create a new username and password. Web register an existing account LOG IN TO YOUR ACCOUNT Username Password Forgot Username Forgot Password Next Have an account, but have never logged in? Web register an existing account Check your account balance, transaction history, and investment allocations. Add money to your balance as a one-time or recurring contribution. Easily invite friends and family to help give your savings a boost. Need help? 1-877-465-2378 Monday to Friday 8:30 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET Not enrolled? java.lang.AssertionError: Expected error message for empty fields not found! Actual page text: Log in to securely access your 529 plan account Your account is protected with two-factor authentication. Each time you log in, you're required to enter a one-time-use PIN to verify your identity. Important Note: CollegeAdvantage will be closing the Advantage Age Based 2026/2027 Portfolio on July 10,2026. All shares will be exchanged into the Advantage Age-Based Graduate Portfolio. This will not count towards your allowed annual exchanges. If you have any questions about these changes, please call us at 1-800-AFFORD-IT (233-6734) Monday through Friday from 8:30 a.m. to 6 p.m. Eastern Time. LOG IN TO YOUR ACCOUNT Username Password Forgot Username Forgot Password Next Have an account, but have never logged in? Web register an existing account Check your account balance, transaction history, and investment allocations. Add money to your balance as a one-time or recurring contribution. Easily invite friends and family to help give your savings a boost. Need help? 1-800-AFFORD-IT(233-6734) Monday - Friday 8:30 a.m. - 6:00 p.m. ET Not enrolled? Start Enrollment expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:110) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1577) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:56) at frontoffice.login.IDPLoginStepDefs.verifyEmptyFieldsErrorMessage(IDPLoginStepDefs.java:283) at ✽.an error message "Username and password are required." should be displayed(file:///builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/login/common/feature/IDPLogin.feature:109)

Actual page text: Log in to securely access your 529 plan account Your account is protected with two-factor authentication. Each time you log in, you're required to enter a one-time-use PIN to verify your identity. LOG IN TO YOUR ACCOUNT Username Password Forgot Username Forgot Password Next Have an account, but have never logged in? Web register an existing account Check your account balance, transaction history, and investment allocations. Add money to your balance as a one-time or recurring contribution. Easily invite friends and family to help give your savings a boost. Need help? 1-866-728-3529 Monday to Friday 8 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET Not enrolled? /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite/bin/regression/daily/stage1-idp-login.xml 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE suite SYSTEM "https://testng.org/testng-1.0.dtd">
<suite thread-count="3" parallel="tests" data-provider-thread-count="3" name="Regression Test (Front Office) in Stage1 - IDP Login" guice-stage="DEVELOPMENT" verbose="4">
  <listeners>
    <listener class-name="core.listener.PrimeResourceManager"/>
  </listeners>
  <test thread-count="3" parallel="tests" name="NMD - IDP Login and Recovery" verbose="4">
    <parameter name="features" value="frontoffice/login/common/feature/IDPLogin.feature"/>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE suite SYSTEM "https://testng.org/testng-1.0.dtd">
<suite thread-count="1" parallel="tests" data-provider-thread-count="4" name="Stage1 Unite Regression Master Suite" guice-stage="DEVELOPMENT" verbose="4">
  <listeners>
    <listener class-name="core.listener.PrimeResourceManager"/>
  </listeners>
  <suite-files>
    <suite-file path="stage1-idp-login.xml"/>
    <suite-file path="stage1-web-registration.xml"/>
    <suite-file path="stage1-csr-acct-maintenance.xml"/>
    <suite-file path="stage1-contributions.xml"/>
    <suite-file path="stage1-withdrawals.xml"/>
  </suite-files>
</suite> <!-- Stage1 Unite Regression Master Suite -->

runScenario("Successful IDP login for IDP Login", "IDP Member Login and Recovery Flows")
Starting scenario file: /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/login/common/feature/IDPLogin.feature
 Starting scenario: Successful IDP login for IDP Login
 Traunch for Successful IDP login for IDP Login is nmd
load test cases (PASSED)
starting "login" URL for "member" (PASSED)
 Obtaining browser from resource manager
using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): nmd
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 select traunch_id plan_id, voucher_prefix plan_prefix, state plan_state, uuid_traunch_id plan_uuid, product_type plan_type, backend_type plan_backend, name plan_name from tu_traunch where branding = 'njdirect' and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 SELECT listagg(f.fund_id, ';') within group (ORDER BY f.fund_id) funds FROM tu_traunch_fund tf, tu_funds f, tu_traunch t WHERE t.branding = 'njdirect' and t.traunch_id = tf.traunch_id and tf.fund_id = f.fund_id and f.ctl_rec_stat = 'A' and f.back_status = 'A' and f.web_status = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Traunch for Invalid IDP login (username) for Invalid User is njd

starting "login" URL for "member" (PASSED)
 Obtaining browser from resource manager
using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): njd
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 SELECT listagg(f.fund_id, ';') within group (ORDER BY f.fund_id) funds FROM tu_traunch_fund tf, tu_funds f, tu_traunch t WHERE t.branding = 'patap' and t.traunch_id = tf.traunch_id and tf.fund_id = f.fund_id and f.ctl_rec_stat = 'A' and f.back_status = 'A' and f.web_status = 'A'

 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY

Starting scenario file: /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/login/common/feature/IDPLogin.feature
 Starting scenario: Forgot Username Flow for Forgot Username
 Traunch for Forgot Username Flow for Forgot Username is ndd
load test cases (PASSED)
starting "login" URL for "member" (PASSED)
 Obtaining browser from resource manager
using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): ndd
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 Getting test case Forgot Username

Starting scenario file: /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/transactions/withdrawal/common/feature/MemberWithdrawal.feature

load test cases (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' AS password, tp.LAST_4_SSN AS last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON A.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND a.CTL_REC_STAT = 'A' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND nvl(m.web_access,' ') <> 'D' AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TU_FUND_BALANCE fb WHERE fb.seq_acct_id = A.seq_acct_id AND fb.total_units > 10 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tu_fin_txn tft WHERE tft.seq_acct_id = A.seq_acct_id AND tft.fin_type = 'WDRWL' AND tft.trade_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 3) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): nmd
 Schema: null
 Query executed
get Withdrawal Automation UE account details from database for Qualified withdrawal to BENE with partial balance opted (PASSED)
 Getting test case Qualified withdrawal to BENE with partial balance opted
 Executing query:
 SELECT account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal, listagg(fund_id, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) funds, listagg(total_units, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) units FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.uii_acct_id||a.uii_acct_ext account, a.seq_acct_id, a.reg_type, b.fund_id, b.total_units, nvl(p.bucket_value, 0) principal FROM tu_acct a left JOIN tu_acct_buckets p ON a.seq_acct_id = p.seq_acct_id AND p.bucket_id = '1' left JOIN tu_fund_balance b ON a.seq_acct_id = b.seq_acct_id AND b.total_units > 0 WHERE a.uii_acct_id = ? AND a.uii_acct_ext = ?) GROUP BY account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal
 With bindings (in order): 968950700; 01
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' AS password, tp.LAST_4_SSN AS last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON A.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND a.CTL_REC_STAT = 'A' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND nvl(m.web_access,' ') <> 'D' AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TU_FUND_BALANCE fb WHERE fb.seq_acct_id = A.seq_acct_id AND fb.total_units > 10 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tu_fin_txn tft WHERE tft.seq_acct_id = A.seq_acct_id AND tft.fin_type = 'WDRWL' AND tft.trade_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 3) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): njd
 Schema: null
 Query executed
get Withdrawal Automation UE account details from database for Qualified withdrawal to AO K12 with with partial balance opted (PASSED)
 Getting test case Qualified withdrawal to AO K12 with with partial balance opted
 Executing query:
 SELECT account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal, listagg(fund_id, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) funds, listagg(total_units, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) units FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.uii_acct_id||a.uii_acct_ext account, a.seq_acct_id, a.reg_type, b.fund_id, b.total_units, nvl(p.bucket_value, 0) principal FROM tu_acct a left JOIN tu_acct_buckets p ON a.seq_acct_id = p.seq_acct_id AND p.bucket_id = '1' left JOIN tu_fund_balance b ON a.seq_acct_id = b.seq_acct_id AND b.total_units > 0 WHERE a.uii_acct_id = ? AND a.uii_acct_ext = ?) GROUP BY account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal
 With bindings (in order): B17862879; 01
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 Executing query:
 SELECT TFT.TOTAL_AMT AS WTHD_AMOUNT, I.PRINCIPAL_AMT, TA.UII_ACCT_ID || '-' || TA.UII_ACCT_EXT AS ACCOUNTID, TFT.FIN_TYPE FROM TU_FIN_TXN TFT INNER JOIN TU_ACCT TA ON TFT.SEQ_ACCT_ID = TA.SEQ_ACCT_ID INNER JOIN TU_FIN_INSTRUCTION I ON I.SEQ_FIN_TXN_ID = TFT.SEQ_FIN_TXN_ID WHERE I.ACTIVITY = 'OUT' AND TRUNC(TFT.TRADE_DATE) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TA.UII_ACCT_ID || '-' || TA.UII_ACCT_EXT = ? AND TFT.CHANGE_ID = ?
 With bindings (in order): 37179508601; XO77-8349797

 Query executed

 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' AS password, tp.LAST_4_SSN AS last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON A.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND a.CTL_REC_STAT = 'A' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND nvl(m.web_access,' ') <> 'D' AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TU_FUND_BALANCE fb WHERE fb.seq_acct_id = A.seq_acct_id AND fb.total_units > 10 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tu_fin_txn tft WHERE tft.seq_acct_id = A.seq_acct_id AND tft.fin_type = 'WDRWL' AND tft.trade_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 3) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): nyd
 Schema: null
 Query executed
get Withdrawal Automation UE account details from database for Qualified withdrawal to AO with with partial balance opted (PASSED)
 Getting test case Qualified withdrawal to AO with with partial balance opted
 Executing query:
 SELECT account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal, listagg(fund_id, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) funds, listagg(total_units, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) units FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.uii_acct_id||a.uii_acct_ext account, a.seq_acct_id, a.reg_type, b.fund_id, b.total_units, nvl(p.bucket_value, 0) principal FROM tu_acct a left JOIN tu_acct_buckets p ON a.seq_acct_id = p.seq_acct_id AND p.bucket_id = '1' left JOIN tu_fund_balance b ON a.seq_acct_id = b.seq_acct_id AND b.total_units > 0 WHERE a.uii_acct_id = ? AND a.uii_acct_ext = ?) GROUP BY account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal
 With bindings (in order): 371795086; 01
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 Executing query:
 SELECT TFT.TOTAL_AMT AS WTHD_AMOUNT, I.PRINCIPAL_AMT, TA.UII_ACCT_ID || '-' || TA.UII_ACCT_EXT AS ACCOUNTID, TFT.FIN_TYPE FROM TU_FIN_TXN TFT INNER JOIN TU_ACCT TA ON TFT.SEQ_ACCT_ID = TA.SEQ_ACCT_ID INNER JOIN TU_FIN_INSTRUCTION I ON I.SEQ_FIN_TXN_ID = TFT.SEQ_FIN_TXN_ID WHERE I.ACTIVITY = 'OUT' AND TRUNC(TFT.TRADE_DATE) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TA.UII_ACCT_ID || '-' || TA.UII_ACCT_EXT = ? AND TFT.CHANGE_ID = ?
 With bindings (in order): 37179508601; XG33-9712804

 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' AS password, tp.LAST_4_SSN AS last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON A.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND a.CTL_REC_STAT = 'A' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND nvl(m.web_access,' ') <> 'D' AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TU_FUND_BALANCE fb WHERE fb.seq_acct_id = A.seq_acct_id AND fb.total_units > 10 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tu_fin_txn tft WHERE tft.seq_acct_id = A.seq_acct_id AND tft.fin_type = 'WDRWL' AND tft.trade_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 3) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

 Traunch for User Login using Web Registered Accounts for Qualified withdrawal to AO K12 with with partial balance opted is mdd

 Obtaining browser from resource manager

load test cases (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' AS password, tp.LAST_4_SSN AS last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON A.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND a.CTL_REC_STAT = 'A' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND nvl(m.web_access,' ') <> 'D' AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TU_FUND_BALANCE fb WHERE fb.seq_acct_id = A.seq_acct_id AND fb.total_units > 10 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tu_fin_txn tft WHERE tft.seq_acct_id = A.seq_acct_id AND tft.fin_type = 'WDRWL' AND tft.trade_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 3) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): mdd
 Schema: null
 Query executed
get Withdrawal Automation UE account details from database for Qualified withdrawal to AO K12 with with partial balance opted (PASSED)
 Getting test case Qualified withdrawal to AO K12 with with partial balance opted
 Executing query:
 SELECT account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal, listagg(fund_id, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) funds, listagg(total_units, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) units FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.uii_acct_id||a.uii_acct_ext account, a.seq_acct_id, a.reg_type, b.fund_id, b.total_units, nvl(p.bucket_value, 0) principal FROM tu_acct a left JOIN tu_acct_buckets p ON a.seq_acct_id = p.seq_acct_id AND p.bucket_id = '1' left JOIN tu_fund_balance b ON a.seq_acct_id = b.seq_acct_id AND b.total_units > 0 WHERE a.uii_acct_id = ? AND a.uii_acct_ext = ?) GROUP BY account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal
 With bindings (in order): A69261937; 01
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 Executing query:
 WITH maxdate AS (SELECT ASOF_DATE price_date FROM tu_traunch WHERE traunch_id = 100003) SELECT f.fund_desc, f.fund_id, f.fund_name, regexp_substr(fund_desc, 'fundId=(\d{7})', 1, 1, NULL, 1) linkedid, replace(regexp_substr(fund_desc, '>(\D*)$',1,1, NULL, 1),'','') parsed_name, case when f.fund_type = 'A' then regexp_substr(f.fund_desc, '">(.*)$', 1, 1, NULL, 1) else '' end linkedname, p.price, f.class_type, f.fund_type, f.display_order FROM tu_funds f, tu_traunch_fund t, tu_fund_price p, maxdate d WHERE f.fund_id = t.fund_id AND t.traunch_id = 100003 AND f.back_status = 'A' AND f.fund_id = p.fund_id AND to_char(P.price_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(ASOF_DATE) FROM tu_traunch WHERE ASOF_DATE = p.price_date) > 0 THEN to_char(d.price_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') ELSE (select to_char(MAX(price_date), 'DD/MM/YYYY') from tu_fund_price WHERE FUND_ID = f.fund_id) END
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 SELECT account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal, listagg(fund_id, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) funds, listagg(total_units, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) units FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.uii_acct_id||a.uii_acct_ext account, a.seq_acct_id, a.reg_type, b.fund_id, b.total_units, nvl(p.bucket_value, 0) principal FROM tu_acct a left JOIN tu_acct_buckets p ON a.seq_acct_id = p.seq_acct_id AND p.bucket_id = '1' left JOIN tu_fund_balance b ON a.seq_acct_id = b.seq_acct_id AND b.total_units > 0 WHERE a.uii_acct_id = ? AND a.uii_acct_ext = ?) GROUP BY account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal

Starting scenario file: /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/profileanddocuments/common/feature/MemberPersonalInformation.feature
 Starting scenario: Member updates contact info on IDP plan for Primary Phone Number as Non-Foreign

load test cases (PASSED)
 Obtaining browser from resource manager
using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND a.CTL_REC_STAT = 'A' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND nvl(m.web_access,' ') <> 'D' AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): nmd
 Schema: null
 Query executed
get Web Registered Automation UE account details from database for web registration for Primary Phone Number as Non-Foreign (PASSED)
 Getting test case Primary Phone Number as Non-Foreign
 Executing query:
 SELECT account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal, listagg(fund_id, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) funds, listagg(total_units, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) units FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.uii_acct_id||a.uii_acct_ext account, a.seq_acct_id, a.reg_type, b.fund_id, b.total_units, nvl(p.bucket_value, 0) principal FROM tu_acct a left JOIN tu_acct_buckets p ON a.seq_acct_id = p.seq_acct_id AND p.bucket_id = '1' left JOIN tu_fund_balance b ON a.seq_acct_id = b.seq_acct_id AND b.total_units > 0 WHERE a.uii_acct_id = ? AND a.uii_acct_ext = ?) GROUP BY account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal
 With bindings (in order): 969903854; 01

 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND a.CTL_REC_STAT = 'A' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND nvl(m.web_access,' ') <> 'D' AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): nmd

 Query executed
get Web Registered Automation UE account details from database for web registration for Primary Phone Number as Foreign (PASSED)
 Getting test case Primary Phone Number as Foreign
 Executing query:
 WITH maxdate AS (SELECT ASOF_DATE price_date FROM tu_traunch WHERE traunch_id = 100066) SELECT f.fund_desc, f.fund_id, f.fund_name, regexp_substr(fund_desc, 'fundId=(\d{7})', 1, 1, NULL, 1) linkedid, replace(regexp_substr(fund_desc, '>(\D*)$',1,1, NULL, 1),'','') parsed_name, case when f.fund_type = 'A' then regexp_substr(f.fund_desc, '">(.*)$', 1, 1, NULL, 1) else '' end linkedname, p.price, f.class_type, f.fund_type, f.display_order FROM tu_funds f, tu_traunch_fund t, tu_fund_price p, maxdate d WHERE f.fund_id = t.fund_id AND t.traunch_id = 100066 AND f.back_status = 'A' AND f.fund_id = p.fund_id AND to_char(P.price_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(ASOF_DATE) FROM tu_traunch WHERE ASOF_DATE = p.price_date) > 0 THEN to_char(d.price_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') ELSE (select to_char(MAX(price_date), 'DD/MM/YYYY') from tu_fund_price WHERE FUND_ID = f.fund_id) END
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 SELECT account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal, listagg(fund_id, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) funds, listagg(total_units, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) units FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.uii_acct_id||a.uii_acct_ext account, a.seq_acct_id, a.reg_type, b.fund_id, b.total_units, nvl(p.bucket_value, 0) principal FROM tu_acct a left JOIN tu_acct_buckets p ON a.seq_acct_id = p.seq_acct_id AND p.bucket_id = '1' left JOIN tu_fund_balance b ON a.seq_acct_id = b.seq_acct_id AND b.total_units > 0 WHERE a.uii_acct_id = ? AND a.uii_acct_ext = ?) GROUP BY account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal

load test cases (PASSED)
 Obtaining browser from resource manager
using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND a.CTL_REC_STAT = 'A' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND nvl(m.web_access,' ') <> 'D' AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): nyd
 Schema: null
 Query executed
get Web Registered Automation UE account details from database for web registration for EBT - Existing Bank (PASSED)
 Getting test case EBT - Existing Bank
 Executing query:
 SELECT account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal, listagg(fund_id, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) funds, listagg(total_units, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) units FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.uii_acct_id||a.uii_acct_ext account, a.seq_acct_id, a.reg_type, b.fund_id, b.total_units, nvl(p.bucket_value, 0) principal FROM tu_acct a left JOIN tu_acct_buckets p ON a.seq_acct_id = p.seq_acct_id AND p.bucket_id = '1' left JOIN tu_fund_balance b ON a.seq_acct_id = b.seq_acct_id AND b.total_units > 0 WHERE a.uii_acct_id = ? AND a.uii_acct_ext = ?) GROUP BY account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal
 With bindings (in order): 371798083; 01
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 Executing query:
 WITH maxdate AS (SELECT ASOF_DATE price_date FROM tu_traunch WHERE traunch_id = 100080) SELECT f.fund_desc, f.fund_id, f.fund_name, regexp_substr(fund_desc, 'fundId=(\d{7})', 1, 1, NULL, 1) linkedid, replace(regexp_substr(fund_desc, '>(\D*)$',1,1, NULL, 1),'','') parsed_name, case when f.fund_type = 'A' then regexp_substr(f.fund_desc, '">(.*)$', 1, 1, NULL, 1) else '' end linkedname, p.price, f.class_type, f.fund_type, f.display_order FROM tu_funds f, tu_traunch_fund t, tu_fund_price p, maxdate d WHERE f.fund_id = t.fund_id AND t.traunch_id = 100080 AND f.back_status = 'A' AND f.fund_id = p.fund_id AND to_char(P.price_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(ASOF_DATE) FROM tu_traunch WHERE ASOF_DATE = p.price_date) > 0 THEN to_char(d.price_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') ELSE (select to_char(MAX(price_date), 'DD/MM/YYYY') from tu_fund_price WHERE FUND_ID = f.fund_id) END
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 SELECT account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal, listagg(fund_id, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) funds, listagg(total_units, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) units FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.uii_acct_id||a.uii_acct_ext account, a.seq_acct_id, a.reg_type, b.fund_id, b.total_units, nvl(p.bucket_value, 0) principal FROM tu_acct a left JOIN tu_acct_buckets p ON a.seq_acct_id = p.seq_acct_id AND p.bucket_id = '1' left JOIN tu_fund_balance b ON a.seq_acct_id = b.seq_acct_id AND b.total_units > 0 WHERE a.uii_acct_id = ? AND a.uii_acct_ext = ?) GROUP BY account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal

using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND a.CTL_REC_STAT = 'A' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND nvl(m.web_access,' ') <> 'D' AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): njd
 Schema: null
 Query executed
get Web Registered Automation UE account details from database for web registration for EBT - Existing Bank (PASSED)
 Getting test case EBT - Existing Bank
 Executing query:
 SELECT account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal, listagg(fund_id, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) funds, listagg(total_units, ',') within group (ORDER BY fund_id) units FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.uii_acct_id||a.uii_acct_ext account, a.seq_acct_id, a.reg_type, b.fund_id, b.total_units, nvl(p.bucket_value, 0) principal FROM tu_acct a left JOIN tu_acct_buckets p ON a.seq_acct_id = p.seq_acct_id AND p.bucket_id = '1' left JOIN tu_fund_balance b ON a.seq_acct_id = b.seq_acct_id AND b.total_units > 0 WHERE a.uii_acct_id = ? AND a.uii_acct_ext = ?) GROUP BY account, seq_acct_id, reg_type, principal
 With bindings (in order): B19980909; 01
 Schema: null
 Query executed
